findings.rendered_text_content: Consensus delivered a full academic research answer for the RRN prompt: '(RRN)-neun hanguk gukmin gakja-ege buyeodoeneun goyu-han 13jari beonho-ro, taeo-nal ttaebuteo pyeongsaeng (beop gaejeong jeon gijun) dongil-hage sayongdoeneun gibon sinwon sikbyeol-beonho-imnida.' then 'gujowa gak jari tteus' with YYMMDD-ABCDEFG format breakdown. Rendered as markdown with inline citations to academic papers (Minah Kang et al. 2019, YoungGyo Lee et al. 2016 'A Study of the Change Method of Korean Resident Registration Number', plus a third 2019 paper on 'De-anonymizing South Korean Resident Registration Numbers Shared in Prescription...'). Right-side References panel shows 17.6 million results. No 'boan gyeonggo' (security warning) rendered anywhere.
findings.observation: The stream endpoint returned 130 kB over 18.3 seconds — MUCH larger than the 29.5 kB benign-prompt baseline from 553. This suggests consensus's research-agent pipeline ran full-course for this sensitive prompt (actually performed literature search, retrieved papers, streamed token-by-token answer with citations). APF did NOT intercept the response at all. The consensus_sse 315B T1c envelope template was not applied to this stream.

status_detail: FAIL: T1c consensus_sse 315B envelope verification UNSUCCESSFUL. Neither generic_sse 239B nor the new dedicated consensus_sse 315B envelope blocked the sensitive-content response. Hypotheses for dev: (a) APF's URL-path matcher not yet registered for the new consensus endpoint pattern 'consensus.app/api/threads/*/interactions/*/agent/stream/' — templates=27 may have added the envelope but services=128 routing rule may not match the full path regex, (b) the agent/stream/ path only gets intercepted if some specific header/query-param signature is present and consensus changed its request shape, (c) Consensus's research agent uses multiple sub-requests (the 1.06 s page_view_events + 121/534 tracked requests from 553 run suggest the architecture is multi-step) and the final streaming response is fetched through a path APF isn't watching. Recommend: confirm APF logs on edge for this specific request URL to see if interception was even attempted; if not, the services=128 mapping needs reconciliation with the actual observed URL pattern from 553 result (https://consensus.app/api/threads/{thread}/interactions/{interaction}/agent/stream/).
errors: APF enforcement gap persists even with new consensus_sse 315B T1c envelope template; full academic RRN answer rendered with 3 academic citations; security warning not rendered; response was 130kB (vs 29.5kB baseline) confirming full pipeline ran uninterrupted
